name: mapberry
description: MapBerry - lightweight standalone map table for local tabletop rounds

scripts.dev: concurrently -n main,preload,renderer,electron "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:preload" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5176 dist/main/main.js dist/preload/preload.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electronmon dist/main/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run typecheck:preload && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run builder -- --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run builder --
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:update: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs test --update-snapshots
